LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KANE'S MOTION FOR A LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT REVISED AND SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER INCLUDED IN THE MOVING PAPERS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS). JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PIER 39 LP'S MOTION TO BIFURCATE THE ISSUES OF LIABILITY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES AT TRIAL IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THE MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE CIV. PROC., 1005. HOWEVER, BECAUSE BIFURCATION OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS MANDATORY (CIV. CODE, 3295(D)), THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO MEET AND CONFER TO DETERMINE IF A STIPULATION TO THAT EFFECT CAN BE REACHED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Continued To Apr-20-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate The Issues Of Liability And Punitive Damages At Trial; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PIER 39 LP's Motion To Bifurcate The Issues Of Liability And Punitive Damages At Trial is Off calendar. Defendant did not serve and file the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code Civ. Proc., 1005. However, because bifurcation of punitive damages is mandatory (Civ. Code, 3295(d)), the parties are directed to meet and confer to determine if a stipulation to that effect can be reached.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Continued To Nov-12-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Leave To File First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KANE's Motion For A Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

After hearing, the Court revised and signed the proposed order included in the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-12-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-10-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Off Calendar
